title: SweechBar reads from daemon HTTP (not subprocess)
description: SweechBar shells out to sweech for every read — spawning Node, parsing TypeScript, exiting, 25× per refresh — while the daemon is on 127.0.0.1:7801 with the same data already computed. /api/usage exists with zero callers.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 3: "SweechBar shells out to sweech for every read — spawning Node, parsing TypeScript, exiting, 25× per refresh — while the daemon is right there on 127.0.0.1:7801"

acceptanceCriteria: fetch(), fetchVault(), refreshProviderQuotas() call daemon HTTP first
CLI subprocess remains as fallback when daemon is down/unreachable
Mutating actions (assign / accounts add) still go through CLI — daemon read-only from Swift side
Popover open is measurably faster (≥3× under cold cache); document before/after in commit msg
No regression when daemon is intentionally stopped — UI degrades gracefully to CLI path
